basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER) Clinical Research Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of PGIMER. Has been announced through the PGIMER Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc. M.Sc. M.Pharm., B.Pharm., or degree/diploma in clinical research, At least 1 year of experience at clinical trial sites
qualification.details: BSc. M.Sc. M.Pharm., B.Pharm., or degree/diploma in clinical research. At least 1 year of experience at clinical trial sites.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Clinical Research Coordinator post at PGIMER?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Clinical Research Coordinator position at PGIMER is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BSc, MSc, MPharm, BPharm, or a degree/diploma in clinical research. Additionally, at least one year of experience at clinical trial sites is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the PGIMER recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the provided information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month for the duration of the contract.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Clinical Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Clinical Research Coordinator post at PGIMER will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Clinical Research Coordinator position is scheduled to be held on 26th May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. Please check the provided links for download.
